seo.title: PrimaSTEM | How It Works — Product Details
seo.description: Complete technical overview of the PrimaSTEM educational robot. Components, commands, drawing, specifications. From €235 excl. VAT.

hero.title: How PrimaSTEM works
hero.videoCaption: Video recorded with a prototype. Final product may differ.

steps.text: Place tokens left to right. Green LED = accepted. The board speaks the command.
Press "Start." The robot executes. LEDs show which command is running.
Check the result. Wrong? Find the error, swap a token, run again.

commands.title: Commands
commands.text:
• Movement & Program: Forward, Backward, Left, Right, Random, Function, Pause.
  • Repeat: 2–999, Random repeat 1–6.
  • Mathematics: +, −, ×, ÷, √, ^
  • Numbers: 1–999
  • System: Default step size, calibration.

drawing.title: Drawing
drawing.text:
Insert a marker. Every movement leaves a line.

Forward 50, Right 144, Repeat 5 = a star. Add an arithmetic progression — the star turns into a spiral.

These shapes are programmed by children, drawn by the robot.

maps.title: Works with any map
maps.text: Step size is adjustable. 10, 12, 15, 25 cm — any grid. Use maps from any robot already in your classroom. No new materials needed.

openPlatform.title: Open platform
paragraphs: Every token is a standard NFC tag (13.56 MHz). Write any code using a free phone app. Create your own numbers, loops or arithmetic operations.
NFC tags on the playing field — the robot plays audio when it drives over them. Language cards, musical fields, story quests.

voiceFeedback.title: Voice feedback
paragraphs: The board speaks each token as it's placed. Helps children who can't read yet and children with visual impairments.
Available in 17 languages: English, Français, Русский, Українська, Deutsch, Español, Italiano, Português (Brasil), Nederlands, Norsk, Polski, Svenska, Türkçe, Dansk, Català, 日本語, עברית.

rows.label: Audio
rows.value: Voice feedback in 17 languages + sound samples
